title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at L&T Realty Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About L&T Realty Advisory Limited:
L&T Realty Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty Advisory Limited!
